title: Trior/and wor/wand nettypes missing from FST trace module
body:
Thanks for the great software!

It appears maybe the relatively recently added support for `trior/and` and `wor/wand` net types was missing updates for FST dumping of the same?

> Can you please attach an example that shows the issue or missing feature? 

Updating `test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.v` with:

```diff
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.v b/test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.v
index 44ac7feac..4091d0e75 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.v
@@ -38,7 +38,13 @@ module t (/*AUTOARG*/
    tri0            fst_tri0;
    tri1            fst_tri1;
    tri             fst_tri;
+   triand          fst_triand;
+   trior           fst_trior;
+   //trireg          fst_trireg; // Error-UNSUPPORTED
+   wor             fst_wor;
+   wand            fst_wand;
    wire            fst_wire;
+   uwire           fst_uwire;
    inout           fst_inout;

    Test test (/*AUTOINST*/
```

> What output from that test indicates it is wrong, and what is the correct or expected output?

Yields:

```
#vlt/t_trace_fst: %Error: Exec of make failed: Vt_trace_fst__Trace__0__Slow.cpp:41:102: error: ‘TRIAND’ is not a member of ‘VerilatedTraceSigKind’
                make && test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.py  --vlt
```

> What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

`test_regress/t/t_trace_fst.py`

> What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  Did you try it with other simulators?

[master@cc7723390](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/cc77233902f40cf8b90fb267d00890f2a4e3755e)
`Verilator 5.041 devel rev UNKNOWN.REV (mod)`

> What OS and distribution are you using?

Ubuntu/WSL 2.0

> May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

Sure! New to contributing but happy to help if I can!
